chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc.A.No.395 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 26.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for applicant Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Addl.P.G. ----- Learned counsel after arguing this criminal miscellaneous application at some length does not press the same and seeks direction for early conclusion of the case. Learned Addl.P.G. has no objection. Accordingly, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed. The Trial Court is directed to expedite the trial and conclude it within three months under intimation to this Court. JUDGE JUDGE Imran
